title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Keyintel Ltd
body: "Application number 5385  Applicant Intel Corporation objected to the name used by Keyintel Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 21 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Keyintel Ltd is changed to 16223609 Ltd. "
